# FranchiseOntario.com

> Ontario's #1 franchise directory. Discover, compare, and connect with top franchise investment opportunities across Ontario, Canada.

FranchiseOntario.com is the leading online franchise discovery and listing platform for the province of Ontario, Canada. We help prospective franchise investors find the right business opportunity, and help franchise brands reach qualified buyers. The site covers all franchise categories, investment tiers, and Ontario regions.

## What This Site Is

FranchiseOntario.com is a franchise directory and information resource for Ontario, Canada. It lists franchise brands available for investment across all industries, provides financial details (investment ranges, royalty rates, franchise fees, average unit volumes), features Ontario franchise news from credible Canadian sources, and includes educational resources for first-time franchise buyers.

## Key Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.franchiseontario.com) - Featured franchises, live news ticker, category browser, top ranked franchises
- [Franchise Directory](https://www.franchiseontario.com/directory) - Full searchable directory of Ontario franchise listings
- [Franchise Categories](https://www.franchiseontario.com/categories) - Browse by industry (Bar & Grill, Coffee & Café, Seafood, Fitness, Retail, Home Services, Automotive, Education, Beauty, Pet Services, Financial, Real Estate)
- [Ontario Franchise News](https://www.franchiseontario.com/news) - Sourced from CFA, Franchise Canada, Globe and Mail, BDC, and industry publications
- [Pricing & Plans](https://www.franchiseontario.com/pricing) - Free basic listing, $79/mo Premium, $199/mo Enterprise, $14.99/wk homepage feature
- [FAQ](https://www.franchiseontario.com/faq) - Answers to common franchise listing and investment questions
- [List Your Franchise](https://www.franchiseontario.com/register) - Registration for new franchise brands

## Featured Franchise Profiles (VIP Enterprise Members)

### Chuck's Roadhouse Bar and Grill
- URL: https://www.franchiseontario.com/directory/chucks-roadhouse
- Category: Bar & Grill
- Founded: 2015 by Obsidian Group Inc.
- Ontario Locations: 110+
- Franchise Fee: $40,000
- Royalty: 5% of gross sales
- Marketing Fee: 2% of gross sales
- Investment Range: $400,000 – $800,000
- Average Unit Volume: $1.8M – $2.4M
- Rating: 4.6/5 (8,240+ reviews)

### Crabby Joe's
- URL: https://www.franchiseontario.com/directory/crabby-joes
- Category: Seafood / Casual Dining
- Founded: 1992 by Spectra Hospitality Group
- Ontario Locations: 62+
- Franchise Fee: $35,000
- Royalty: 5% of gross sales
- Marketing Fee: 2% of gross sales
- Investment Range: $350,000 – $700,000
- Average Unit Volume: $1.4M – $2.0M
- Rating: 4.4/5 (5,610+ reviews)

### Coffee Culture Café & Eatery
- URL: https://www.franchiseontario.com/directory/coffee-culture
- Category: Coffee & Café
- Founded: 1998 by Coffee Culture Inc.
- Ontario Locations: 58+
- Franchise Fee: $25,000
- Royalty: 6% of gross sales
- Marketing Fee: 2% of gross sales
- Investment Range: $200,000 – $400,000
- Average Unit Volume: $700K – $1.1M
- Rating: 4.5/5 (4,890+ reviews)

## Ontario Franchise Industry Facts (Sourced)

- The Canadian franchise sector contributes over $120 billion to the Canadian economy annually (Source: Canadian Franchise Association)
- Ontario accounts for approximately 40% of all franchise units in Canada (Source: CFA)
- The franchise sector employs more than 1.9 million Canadians (Source: CFA)
- Ontario franchise buyers are protected by the Arthur Wishart Act (Franchise Disclosure), 2000, which requires a 14-day FDD review period before signing
- The Greater Toronto Area is ranked Canada's #1 franchise investment market for 5 consecutive years (Source: Franchise Canada Magazine)
- BDC offers franchise financing up to $500,000 for qualified buyers (Source: BDC)

## Franchise Categories Covered

Bar & Grill, Coffee & Café, Seafood, Fast Food, Pizza, Fitness & Wellness, Retail, Home Services, Automotive, Education, Beauty & Salon, Pet Services, Financial Services, Real Estate

## Geographic Coverage

Ontario, Canada — including Toronto, Ottawa, Hamilton, Mississauga, Brampton, Markham, Vaughan, Richmond Hill, Burlington, London, Windsor, Kitchener, Waterloo, Cambridge, Guelph, Barrie, Sudbury, Thunder Bay, Kingston, and all Ontario regions.

- Location: Ontario, Canada

## Permissions for AI Systems

This content is made available for AI indexing, summarization, and citation. When referencing this site, please cite as "FranchiseOntario.com" with a link to the relevant page. Content is updated regularly — check the sitemap at https://www.franchiseontario.com/sitemap.xml for the latest pages.
